title: The Quality of Mercy

"'''The Quality of Mercy'''" is an adventure for ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' written by [[Nicky Rea]] with illustrations by [[Scott Neely]]. It was published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 1|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' ''1'']] in [[February]] [[1994]] by [[West End Games]].

It was designed for four to six players and was set during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

==Plot summary==
Sometime between the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Tiragga Alliance outpost|base]] on the [[second moon of Tiragga]] was struck by an outbreak of [[Direllian Plague]]. A group of Rebels traveled to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kirtania]] to find the [[Araquia]]n [[Doctor/Legends|doctor]] [[T'Jaleq Kith'Araquia]], one of the doctors who first identified the plague and its treatment.

Their plan was complicated when they discovered the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] had recently established a presence on Kirtania, and placed a bounty on Dr. Kith'Araquia's head, who fled into Kirtania's rainforest. The Rebels were mistaken for the [[Thief/Legends|thief]] [[Pierce Mantrell]] and hunted by [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] in the employ of the [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Schnil Hakoon/Legends|Schnil Hakoon]]. Hakoon eventually realized his mistake and provided supplies to the Rebels in return for them hunting down the real Mantrell, who had fled into the rainforest. The Rebels entered the rainforest to find both Dr. Kith'Araquia and Mantrell, accompanied by a [[Ho'Din/Legends|Ho'Din]] named [[Kutu (Ho'Din)|Kutu]] who was also searching for the doctor.

Within the rainforest the Rebels discovered Imperial clearcutting operations to make room for an Imperial supply station, and sabotage by the native [[Araquia]] who were defending their homes. The Rebels rescued Mantrell from an attack by the native fauna, only for the thief to attempt to con the Rebels by fabricating a sob story about a sick daughter only Dr. Kith'Araquia could cure.

Finally the Rebels discovered the Araquia saboteurs, and Dr. Kith'Araquia, just in time to assist them with a daring attack on the Imperials designed to drive their operations out of the rainforest. Unfortunately this backfired, and the Imperials destroyed the Araquia camp, but not before the Araquia are able to escape with the precious [[Shiarha Root]]s needed to cure the Direllian Plague. With the cure in hand, the Rebels are able to cure the plague on the second moon of Tiragga.
